content: bootleg whiskey, two mistresses and a bank account full of money tithed to the church. His hypocrisy charmed Sisocharis. Within six months, he taught the Reverend several new debaucheries and convinced him that forgiveness came from Set, not Jesus. The fallen preacher served his sire as a ghoul for ten years before receiving the Embrace. While Prohibition lasted, Jones’ church kept barrels of Canadian booze and thehastily-buried cadavers of three G-men in its basement. Many in Jones’ town heard the Gospel of Set disguised as the Gospel of Jesus. After Prohibition, Jones and Sisocharis found new opportunities in prostitution. That required a much larger basement, but Jones convinced the townspeople to build him a bigger church. The mayor and sheriff both endorsed the idea…. When the Fbi nosed around again, in search of a teenage girl abducted across state lines, Sisocharis and Jones reluctantly moved theiroperation to a big city and burned the church down behind them, with a body to stand in for Jones. Sisocharis took this as a sign that his acolyte was ready to transcend mortality and Embraced him. After another ten years, Jones felt himself ready to graduate from Sisocharis’ tutelage. Set called him to some greater purpose than vice-mongering. As a token of his ended Set and pronouncing himself unafraid to join his god. Most childehood, Jones Egyptianized his first name, and Djoser vampires find this sufficiently creepy that they will back off. Jones set forth to help his fellow Setites retain theirholy zeal. Note that although Jones believes he follows the Path of Ty Djoser Jones is an old-time revival preacher, Setite-style. He phon, he actually remains tied to Humanity. His high Conscience drives his van from city to city, visiting Setite cults and coteries, derives from his faith in Set’s mercy and forgiveness of his crimes. conducting high-energy religious services the likes of which his Clan: Followers of Set clanmates have never seen before. Jones rewrites classic revival Sire: Sisocharis hymns to give them Setite lyrics; he and his two human ghouls Nature: Caregiver accompany the songs with a drum and piano, while the con Demeanor: Celebrant gregants pass Jones’ ghoul rattlesnake from hand to hand. Jones Generation: 11th supports his “crusade” through free-will offerings and murdering and robbing the occasional well-heeled pimpor drug dealer. Embrace: 1934 Most Theophidians find Jones’ comprehension of their theol- Apparent Age: 38 ogy…dubious. He gives Theophidian doctrine his own odd spin, Physical: Strength 2, Dexterity 2, Stamina 3 that Set wants people to sin so he can forgive them. No one denies Social: Charisma 4, Manipulation 4, Appearance 2 that Jones knows how to play a congregation, though. He has led many slacker Setites Leadership 2, Streetwise 2, Subterfuge 3 back to the Dark Lord’s service. whatever religion had grown to prominence at any given time: Islam, Christianity and even Animism at certain points. By the time he had reached a relatively advanced age for Nubians — his 30s — Hesha had fallen in with a cult that had gained no small bit of notoriety. This was a blood cult, a herd of mortals tricked into believing in the divinity of their Kindred patron. The cult’s Setite leader Embraced Hesha, seeing in the man a cleverness and intellect that he thought would serve him well in his quest to reincarnate his dead god. Indeed, Hesha’s sire grew so proud of his progeny in the modern nights that he renamed himself Abu Ruhadze in the Islamictradition: “the father of Ruhadze.” After his Embrace, Hesha acclimated quite well to the “Cainite” condition. His newfound toughness was a great boon during the long nights he spent uncovering the hidden lore of Kindred and other chthonic creatures. Mentored at first by his sire, Hesha felt the calling of his clan’s legacy. Abu Ruhadze knew he had chosenwisely, and instructed his childe in the ways of the Path of Typhon. His progeny proved once again to be a fervent pupil. To this night, Hesha’s clanmates consider him a near paragon of the Theophidians, revered for hisdevotion to the god of the Underworld and his spiritual wisdom. of the forgotten kings. The diamond shall drown in blood, and the rest of the world soon after. Background: The Indian mastermind, Sundervere, remains a mystery to the Followers of Set despite being one of their Daitya kin. Few Western Setites have ever spoken with the enigmatic elder; he prefers to workonly with other Daitya, or with mortal Indians and various strange and secret cults scattered around the world. Clan rumor holds that he and the similarly mysterious Qufur am-Heru, self-proclaimed Set’s Champion, have an understanding and work together on occasion. Sundervere first came to theattention of Western vampires in the Victorian period, when he launched several elite retainers appear in a single story; these may be other campaigns to destroy the Western vampires residing in Indian vampires, ghouled mortalsor animals, spirits, or whatever else cities. Growing more daring, he took the battle for the Indian appeals to the Storyteller’s demented imagination. night to the very heart of the British Empire, where he nearly Sundervere accepts defeats gracefully. He doesn’t believe murdered London’s Prince Mithras andbriefly subverted the in revenge. After all, his eventual victory will destroy his Foreign Office. Sundervere proved himself a master of impos enemies along with the world, while he enjoys eternal power sible escapes, returning from seemingly certain Final Death no and glory as one of the gods. less than three times before he dropped out of sight in 1922. Clan: Followers of Set (Daitya) Now the Devil Brahmin rises again and his shadow stretches Sire: Porphyrion around the world. The time has come to initiate the Great Destruc Nature: Fanatiction. Sundervere reads of ill-guarded nuclear arsenals in Russia, Demeanor: Architect and smiles. He thinks of deadly bacilli in genetics labs, and laughs. To Sundervere, however, these technological terrorsmerely serve Generation: 6th as preparations and distractions. All the murderous ingenuity of Embrace: 1227 Man shall pale when the ancient sorcery of India throws wide the Apparent Age: Late 50s Gate and Lord Shiva opens his third eye to annihilate the world. Physical: Strength 3, Dexterity 4, Stamina 5 Image: At first glance, Sundervere is just a small, skinny Social: Charisma 5, Manipulation 5, Appearance 1 man in late middle age, with a shaved head, a V-mark on his Mental: Perception 3, Intelligence 6, Wits 4 forehead and a white robe. Then you see his eyes — black, mag Talents: Alertness 4, Dodge 3, Empathy 2, Intimidation 3, netic, burning with fanatical will. The void stares back at you. Tm Tm Children of the God of Storms The Followers of Set area clan bound together not only by blood,, but by ties of faith..
